sources.name: cOnO Consultores by Casula
sources.notes: Teamtailor RSS. Real job URLs, structured location/role. Mostly commercial roles.

sources.name: VinoEmpleo
sources.notes: WordPress WP Job Manager feed. Real job URLs, full descriptions.

sources.name: EnoJobsOnline
sources.notes: WordPress feed. Employer name via dc:creator. Descriptions often empty in feed.

sources.name: EmpleoVino (E-commerce/Digital)
sources.notes: DISABLED: no working job feed found (/feed/ 404s). Needs an HTML adapter.

sources.name: Chelsea & Co Careers
sources.notes: DISABLED: small custom site, no feed. Needs a bespoke HTML adapter. Low volume.

sources.name: Founderful (Senior PM)
sources.notes: DISABLED: 'Consider' job platform. JSON API needs correct board id/params (returns 500 without). High-value PM source — good next adapter.

sources.name: Pearson (remote Product Management)
sources.notes: DISABLED: JS-rendered board; deep-linked job URLs 404. Needs the site's search API.

sources.name: Merck Group (product search)
sources.notes: DISABLED: Phenom-powered SPA. Needs the Phenom widget/search API. Real PM roles exist in Spain.

sources.name: Vodafone Spain (Product Management)
sources.notes: DISABLED: Eightfold API returns 403 (Not authorized) without a valid session/token. Real PM roles exist; needs authenticated API adapter.
